payload.message: Run the backup script at /root/.openclaw/workspace/scripts/backup.sh, then send a WhatsApp message to +85291621392 saying 'Daily backup complete: [filename]' with the backup filename.

Run the email check script at /root/.openclaw/workspace/scripts/check-emails.py and analyze the output.

If the output contains 'URGENT_EMAILS_FOUND', send a WhatsApp message to +85291621392 with:
- A summary of the urgent emails (subject, sender, date)
- A brief summary of what each email is about

If the output is 'NO_URGENT_EMAILS', do nothing and end the session silently.

Use the exec tool to run: python3 /root/.openclaw/workspace/scripts/check-emails.py

Run /root/.openclaw/workspace/scripts/auto-backup.sh to commit and push any workspace changes to GitHub. If there are no changes, exit silently. Commit message should describe what changed. Report back with a brief summary of what was pushed.

Run the Patreon fetch script: cd /root/.openclaw/workspace && node scripts/patreon-fetch.js

After fetching, read patreon-posts.json and create a concise summary in Chinese of the latest posts from each creator this week.

Reply with your summary starting with '📊 **Patreon 每週內容摘要**' so it gets delivered to the configured channel.

jobs.name: Memory Freshener - Weekly
jobs.description: Weekly: Reviews SESSION-STATE.md freshness, syncs from daily notes, updates if stale

payload.message:
AUTONOMOUS TASK: Memory Freshener

1. Read SESSION-STATE.md — check if it has been updated in the past 7 days
2. Read memory/YYYY-MM-DD.md files for the past week — look for patterns, decisions, open threads
3. If SESSION-STATE.md is stale (not updated recently), update it with latest context from daily notes
4. Check heartbeat-state.json — update lastChecks.memory_flush timestamp
5. Check if any open threads in SESSION-STATE.md should be promoted to MEMORY.md
6. Report briefly what was done (1-2 sentences max)

Do NOT ask questions. Just do the work and report completion.

jobs.name: Learnings Review - Bi-weekly
jobs.description: Bi-weekly: Reviews .learnings/ files and promotes quality entries to AGENTS.md/TOOLS.md

payload.message:
AUTONOMOUS TASK: Learnings Review

1. Read .learnings/LEARNINGS.md — check for entries not yet promoted to AGENTS.md, TOOLS.md, or SOUL.md
2. Read .learnings/ERRORS.md — check for patterns that need to be fixed in TOOLS.md
3. For each un-promoted learning:
   - If broadly applicable to workflows → promote to AGENTS.md
   - If tool-specific → promote to TOOLS.md
   - If behavioral → promote to SOUL.md
4. Log promotion actions in .learnings/ itself (cross-reference)
5. Report: "Promoted X entries to AGENTS.md, Y entries to TOOLS.md"

Do NOT ask questions. Just review and promote.
Run /root/.openclaw/workspace/scripts/wiki-lint.sh and post the output to Discord.

jobs.name: Wiki Settings Review
jobs.description: Review wiki settings after 1 month of use

payload.message: Wiki Settings Review: It's been ~1 month since we set up the LLM Wiki. Review the settings we configured (Focus: Tech+Business, Source Intake: One-at-a-time, Detail Level: Standard, Auto-Lint: Weekly). Time to ask Franky how the workflow has been and if any settings should change. Reach out on Discord.
Run /root/.openclaw/workspace/scripts/wiki-sync.sh to sync the Y2 wiki to GitHub. Report success/failure.
